info.title: dotviz – .NET dependency graph generator
info.description: Global CLI tool that draws .NET dependency graphs (projects, NuGet, DI) as Graphviz or Mermaid.

options.name: --package-scope
options.description:
(Default: direct) direct (only <PackageReference/>) |
all (transitive) . Ignored if --packages is false.

options.name: --edge-label
options.description:
(Default: false) Write 'PackageReference' or
'Reference' labels on edges.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Comma-separated substrings. Matching projects or
packages are omitted from the graph.

options.name: --collapse-matching
options.description:
Collapse a NuGet package when its name matches a
project name; draw a special coloured project =>
project edge instead.

options.name: --per-project
options.description:
With --folder: emit one graph per each .csproj in that
folder.

options.name: --mermaid
options.description:
(Default: false) Generate a Mermaid .mmd file instead
of / in addition to DOT

arguments.name: value
arguments.description:
One or more .sln / .csproj paths. If omitted, --folder
must be supplied.
